title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 383.115 - Information confidential, exception
text:
383.115.  Information confidential, exception. — 1.  Information submitted pursuant to subsection 2 of section 383.105, subdivisions (1), (3) and (6) shall be deemed to be confidential communication except as provided in section 383.125.
  2.  Statistics in summary form of the information submitted pursuant to sections 383.100 to 383.125, except as provided in subsection 1, shall be a matter of public record.
(L. 1976 H.B. 1308 § 4)
